case_title: DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES VS JOHNSON GENA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON GENA JOHNSON RON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
POS ON DEF'S.INVALID.2 DEF.SERVED ON 1 POS.DOES NOT SHOW WHO WAS SERVED/MANNER OF SERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON GENA JOHNSON RON 750 O'FARRELL ST. S.F, CA 94109 SEE ATTACHED FOR DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDG.TO JOHNSON GENA.RETURNED. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
